title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN

section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
New building in dry bulk this week, CSSC Qingdao Beihai announced orders for two firm 325k dwt VLOC's from Winning International, with the vessels set to deliver in 2026
Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
